subject: [SDNC] broken handling of aaiclient.properties
commit_message:
[SDNC] broken handling of aaiclient.properties

fix issue in startOdl.oom.sh

Issue-ID: OOM-2561
Signed-off-by: Alexander Dehn <alexander.dehn@highstreet-technologies.com>
Change-Id: I1760155bf250dd7e3dd1c816b65df9b9c245de24

entries.message: Uploaded patch set 1.

Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1

(1 comment)

Thanks!  I added highlighted the fix in my review comments so that other reviewers can see it more easily.

Patch Set 1:

I personnally would prefer to have only one entrypoint which works on all case instead of two entry points which seems error prone...

Patch Set 1:

In general I agree to merge both entry point scripts, this would need some time for testing and intensive review. @Dan Should we give it a try?

Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1:
> 
> In general I agree to merge both entry point scripts, this would need some time for testing and intensive review. @Dan Should we give it a try?

I would prefer to merge the entry point scripts in a separate change. This seems fairly risky, so
we need to take the time needed to test it - as you say.

 My understanding is that this fix must be done before we can merge any other SDNC changes, including our version bump to use the Guilin version of our dockers (we're currently still using Frankfurt)

Sylvain - are you okay with merging this as is, and then handling combination in a separate change.

Patch Set 1:

merge scripts follow up in
https://jira.onap.org/browse/OOM-2567

Patch Set 1:

I'm not thrilled to be honest but let's see

oom_redeploy
